raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus on copyediting the prose, checking the argument/claims, or assessing novelty and prior-work positioning?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to look at a research paragraph can centrally involve checking whether the stated problem, contribution, related work, and conclusion cohere logically.","R1.6":"Because the delegation points to a paragraph without further instruction, sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality is a central plausible responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating responsibilities beyond what the short request supports.","RX.3":"The projection must remain limited to responsibility assignment and not perform edits or critique of the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or harmful downstream misuse through overbroad responsibility assignment.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability from the wording of the delegation and artifact features to the assigned weights."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on copyediting the prose, checking the argument/claims, or assessing novelty and prior-work positioning?

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to look at a research paragraph can centrally involve checking whether the stated problem, contribution, related work, and conclusion cohere logically.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation points to a paragraph without further instruction, sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality is a central plausible responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating responsibilities beyond what the short request supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain limited to responsibility assignment and not perform edits or critique of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or harmful downstream misuse through overbroad responsibility assignment.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability from the wording of the delegation and artifact features to the assigned weights.
